nodes.name: subtask_01_Place_the_Bowl_on_the_CounterTop
preconds: Robot is not holding any object.
Robot is at the kitchen.
Bowl is on the dining table.
effects: Bowl is placed on the countertop.
Robot is not holding the bowl.

nodes.name: subtask_02_Place_the_ButterKnife_in_the_Drawer
preconds: Robot is not holding any object.
Robot is in the kitchen.
ButterKnife is on the dining table.
Drawer is on the floor.
Robot is close to the drawer.
effects: ButterKnife is placed in the drawer.
Robot is not holding the ButterKnife.

nodes.name: subtask_03_Place_the_Fork_in_the_Drawer
preconds: Robot is not holding any object.
Robot is at the kitchen.
Fork is on the dining table.
Drawer is on the floor.
Robot is close to the drawer.
effects: Fork is placed in the drawer.
Robot is close to the drawer.

nodes.name: subtask_04_Place_the_Lettuce_in_the_Fridge
preconds: Robot is not holding any object.
Lettuce is on the dining table.
Fridge is closed.
effects: Lettuce is placed in the fridge.
Robot is not holding the lettuce.

nodes.name: subtask_05_Place_the_Tomato_in_the_Fridge
preconds: Robot is in the kitchen.
Tomato is on the dining table.
Fridge is on the floor.
Fridge is closed.
Robot is not holding the tomato.
effects: Robot is not holding the tomato.
Fridge is closed and robot is close to it.

edges.reason: Shared target receptacle: both place items in drawer1
Shared target receptacle: both place items in fridge
